risks.title: TSAN lane remains non-blocking while false-positive budget is stabilized
risks.notes: Nightly TSAN runs on 2026-03-23 and 2026-03-24 still reproduced the GNUstep libobjc lock-order-inversion signature during TSAN-instrumented eocc transpilation; keep tsan_experimental non-blocking until that runtime/toolchain issue is resolved and two consecutive deterministic pass cycles are observed.

risks.title: Middleware-heavy benchmark concurrency ladder remains constrained to 1,4
risks.notes: Deferred benchmark roadmap removes this from active release-risk scope; higher-concurrency middleware-heavy validation now lives in the parked comparative benchmark follow-on.

risks.title: Suppression registry maintenance policy maturity
risks.notes: Phase 9H introduced lifecycle policy + validator; keep weekly review cadence in place.
